channel.title: Latest deals on My Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Latest deals on My Hugo Site

item.title: About
item.description: We track discounted products and highlight the best value we find. Pages are updated periodically and built as a static site for fast browsing.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Questions or suggestions? Reach out at youremail@example.com. Replace this address with your preferred contact email or form link before launch.

item.title: Disclosure
item.description: As an Amazon Associate I earn from qualifying purchases. Some links on this site are affiliate links; if you buy through them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Prices and availability can change; check the retailer for the latest details.

item.title: Privacy
item.description: We do not collect personal information unless you choose to share it (for example, by contacting us). Links to retailers are affiliate links; retailers may use their own cookies and tracking per their policies. If you follow a link, review the retailer’s privacy terms. This site is static and does not run server-side code.

item.title: Noise-cancelling over-ears
item.description: Wireless ANC headphones with 30h battery and quick charge.

item.title: Runner's GPS smartwatch
item.description: Built-in GPS, heart-rate, and week-long battery for training.

item.title: 4K streaming stick
item.description: Dolby Vision streaming with voice remote and Wi‑Fi 6.

item.title: Compact mechanical keyboard
item.description: Hot-swappable 65% board with RGB and silent switches.

item.title: Waterproof Bluetooth speaker
item.description: Rugged IPX7 speaker with 12h battery and USB-C.

item.title: Adjustable dumbbell set
item.description: Space-saving weights adjustable from 5–50 lbs per hand.
